hooks.command: printf '%s\n' 'ROUTE-FIRST: should a roster specialist handle this instead of you? Route it if so.' 'CANONICAL-CHECK: does this reply violate the CLAUDE.md chain, the open skill-deltas, or agreed-framings.md? If so, fix it before replying.' '(3) READ-WIKI-FIRST: read the owning concept (state + overview) and its pointed-to source docs before re-deriving a fact.'
